title: The Free-Trader's Guide to Sevarcos
content:

{{Otheruses|Free Trader}}
{{MagazineArticle

|title=The Free-Trader's Guide to Sevarcos
|author=[[Tony Russo|Anthony P. Russo]]

|editor=
|publisher=[[West End Games]]
|release date=[[May]] [[1994]]<ref name="Parent release date">[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]]</ref>

"'''The Free-Trader's Guide to Sevarcos'''" is a role-playing game article by [[Tony Russo|Anthony P. Russo]] for the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|Issue 2]]. The article introduces and details the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sevarcos II]].

{{Game-stub}}

==Media==
===Collected in===
*<!-- 1994-05-XX -->[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]]
*<!-- 1996-03-XX -->''[[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]]''
